title: sorghum lepidum
intro: Sorghum lepidum, also known as woolly sorghum, is a plant species in the sorghum genus that is characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. Traditionally, sorghum lepidum has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Sorghum lepidum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
